name: SCN-002 | Discovery & Enumeration Chain
description: Simulates post-compromise discovery activity — the first thing an attacker does after gaining a foothold. Runs four sequential LOLBin techniques: system info collection (T1082), network configuration mapping (T1016), running process enumeration with security tool detection (T1057), and local user/group enumeration (T1087). All native Windows commands — no external tools required.
